_comment: Metadata for the docs/ manual. The last_synced_commit is the commit at which docs/ was last verified against the implementation; the sync-docs skill (.claude/skills/sync-docs/SKILL.md) diffs HEAD against it and updates this file. Committed to git on purpose so the baseline persists across sessions and machines. A dotfile + .json so a future docs website does not render it as a page.
note: Canvas card title bar now supports right-click context menu (Rename Tab, Change Icon, Close Tab, Close Other/All Tabs in This Worktree) — added to canvas.md. Shelf context menu now shows 'Close Tabs Below' instead of 'Close Tabs to the Right' (label-only, tolerated). PR refresh fixes (#456, #469) and layout restore race fix (#459) are internal behavior fixes, not new features. Toolbar icon fix (#467) cosmetic only.
